title: Linear Congruential Generator (LCG) Operation Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of generating a pseudo-random number using a Linear Congruential Generator and its cyclical nature.
relationships: The algorithm uses the formula: Xₙ₊₁ = (a * Xₙ + c) mod m. The current Seed is multiplied by the Multiplier, the Increment is added, and the result is taken Modulus to produce the New Seed. This New Seed becomes the input for the next iteration and is often scaled to produce the final output.
